steps.title: Find the volume of the cube
steps.content:
For a cube with edge length $a = 3.000$ cm, calculate:
$$V = (3.000)^3 = 27.000 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Apply the density formula to find mass
steps.content:
Use the relationship between mass, density, and volume. Substitute the known values:
$$\text{mass} = 0.170 \text{ g/cm}^3 \times 27.000 \text{ cm}^3 = 4.59 \text{ grams}$$
The mass of the cube is 4.59 grams.
